LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS VICTOR POPOFF, ELIZABETH HORVAT AND RUDOLPH HORVAT'S MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, ORDER ERRONEOUSLY ISSUED ON JANUARY 6, 2010 IS VACATED. THE MOTION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT CAUSES OF ACTION 1 THROUGH 7 ARISES FROM PROTECTED CONDUCT. PLAINTIFFS HAVE PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO CARRY THEIR BURDEN OF SHOWING A PRIMA FACIE CASE FOR RELIEF ON CAUSE OF ACTION 8. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (C). OPPOSING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
